title: [low] podman machine list: --format should imply --noheading
body:
While playing with command completion I noticed:
```console
$ bin/podman machine list --format '{{.Name}}'    <--- or .CPUs or .Starting or ...
NAME
```
All other podman commands (that I know of) suppress headings when invoked with `--format`.

I don't have access to a Mac, so I can't actually test `podman machine anything`. Maybe this works fine on macs, or is desirable there. If so feel free to close.

comments.body: The behaviour should be consistent across all commands so I agree that it should not display the header. AFAIK the user can include headers with `--format 'table {{.Name}}'`
